dialogue.speaker: KAI
dialogue.line: "I'm telling you, VICTORIA, this case stinks of corporate cover-up."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VICTORIA
dialogue.line: "Kai, we can't just jump to conclusions. We need concrete evidence."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VICTORIA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: KAI
dialogue.line: "You're not seeing the big picture, VICTORIA. This is bigger than just a simple murder."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of VICTORIA, her brow furrowed in concern.

dialogue.speaker: VICTORIA
dialogue.line: "Okay, Kai, but we need to tread carefully. One misstep and our licenses are revoked."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of KAI, his eyes flashing with intensity.

dialogue.speaker: KAI
dialogue.line: "I've managed to hack into the victim's comms records. Something's not right."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: VICTORIA
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of KAI, his eyes fixed on the holographic display in front of him.

dialogue.speaker: KAI
dialogue.line: "The victim was involved in some shady dealings. I think we're looking at a conspiracy."
dialogue.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of VICTORIA, her eyes locked on KAI.

dialogue.speaker: VICTORIA
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VICTORIA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: KAI
dialogue.line: "We sneak in, gather evidence, and get out. Simple."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of VICTORIA, her eyes scanning the darkness.

dialogue.speaker: VICTORIA
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAI, his hand on the grip of his pistol.

dialogue.speaker: KAI
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of VICTORIA, a hint of fear in her eyes.
